title: aiLinMc's Strange Mod
description: A Strange mods with big brain teasers.
body:
A Strange mods with big brain teasers.

Unfortunately, the source code for this mod has been lost and it has been discontinued.

## 1. Adds
### - **items**

  There are many interesting items.
  
  For example, you can use _Feather Sword_ to beat your best friends. They will have a 10% chance of getting effect _Itch_. It's deadly.


### - **effect**

  It has some effects, such as _Itch_ and _Infinite Exp_.
  
  If you have effect _Infinity Exp_, you can get lots of exp.


## 2. NOTE
  This mod is only applicable to Minecraft 1.20.1.
  
  Before install, you have to install Forge.
